zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Molyneux於1285年出生在英國藍卡爾蕾托 哥羅士比時，他的父親Sir William de Molyneux22歲，母親Isabella de Scarisbrick19歲。他於大約1309年與Agatha de Kyrton在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1363年4月6日在英國藍卡爾澤福頓享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Molyneux于1285年出生在英国藍卡爾蕾托 哥羅士比时，他的父亲Sir William de Molyneux22岁，母亲Isabella de Scarisbrick19岁。他于大约1309年与Agatha de Kyrton在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1363年4月6日在英国藍卡爾澤福頓享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Molyneux was born in 1285, in Little Crosby, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir William de Molyneux, was 22 and his mother, Isabella de Scarisbrick, was 19. He married Agatha de Kyrton about 1309, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 6 April 1363, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Molyneux est né en 1285, à Little Crosby, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Molyneux, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Scarisbrick, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Agatha de Kyrton environ 1309, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 6 avril 1363, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Molyneux 1285 in Little Crosby, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Molyneux 22 und seine Mutter Isabella de Scarisbrick 19. Er hat um 1309 in Lancashire, England Agatha de Kyrton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 6. April 1363 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Sefton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Molyneux è nato il nel 1285 nel Little Crosby, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Molyneux, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Isabella de Scarisbrick, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Agatha de Kyrton circa 1309, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 aprile 1363, nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Molyneuxが1285年にイギリスランカシュアイアリットル クロスビーで生まれた時，父Sir William de Molyneuxは22歳，母Isabella de Scarisbrickは19歳であった。約1309年にイギリスランカシュアイアでAgatha de Kyrtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1363年4月6日にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Molyneux(이)가 1285년 영국 랭카실르 리틀 크로스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Molyneux(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Scarisbrick(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1309년 영국 랭카실르에서 Agatha de Kyrton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1363년 4월 6일 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Sefton, , Lancashire, England: Sefton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Molyneux nasceu em 1285, em Little Crosby, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Molyneux, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Scarisbrick, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Agatha de Kyrton aproximadamente 1309, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 6 de abril de 1363, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Molyneux родился в 1285 г. в местности литл кросби, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Molyneux было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Scarisbrick, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Agatha de Kyrton около 1309 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 6 апреля 1363 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Molyneux nació en 1285, en Little Crosby, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Molyneux, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Isabella de Scarisbrick, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Agatha de Kyrton aproximadamente 1309, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de abril de 1363, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
